name: Glassdoor Employer & Review API
what_it_does: Glassdoor Employer API for company review, salary, and employer intelligence data platform. Enables AI agents to manage employer review data retrieval and sentiment analysis, handle company rating and culture score tracking automation, access salary benchmark data by job title, location, and industry, retrieve CEO approval and leadership sentiment data, manage interview review and hiring process intelligence, handle employer brand monitoring and reputation tracking, access job listing data and employer career page integration, retrieve benefits and compensation benchmark comparison data, manage competitive employer benchmarking and talent market analysis, and integrate Glassdoor data with HR, talent acquisition, and employer brand platforms.
use_cases: Monitoring employer brand reputation from HR analytics agents
Benchmarking compensation from HR operations agents
Tracking interview experience sentiment from talent acquisition agents
Integrating employer data with HR platforms from workforce intelligence agents
not_for: Consumer job searching without employer intelligence and analytics needs
Product or customer reviews without employer/HR context
B2B lead generation without workforce and employer brand focus
best_when: An HR, talent acquisition, or employer brand team using Glassdoor wants AI agents to automate employer reputation monitoring, compensation benchmarking, interview experience tracking, and HR platform integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Glassdoor reviews are anonymous employee submissions — do not attempt to identify reviewers; attempting de-anonymization violates Glassdoor terms and potentially defamation laws. Salary data is self-reported and may not reflect actual market rates; use as directional signal only.

auth.notes: Glassdoor uses API key (Partner ID + API key) for authentication. Partner program required for API access. REST API at glassdoor.com/developer. Limited public API; most data requires employer or enterprise partner program. No native webhooks. Glassdoor acquired by Recruit Holdings (2018, $1.2B). API availability may be limited.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No meaningful free tier — partner program required
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise partner agreements; employer product subscriptions
pricing.notes: Mill Valley, California. Glassdoor, Inc. Founded 2007. Acquired by Recruit Holdings (2018, $1.2B). Employer review and salary data market leader. 100M+ reviews. 50M+ monthly visitors. Employer Brand Analytics product. Indeed collaboration for job listings. Strong HR and talent acquisition use case. Competes with LinkedIn Talent Insights for employer intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; partner tier determines access volume

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Anonymous reviews must remain anonymous — do not attempt reviewer identification; violates terms and legal protections
Partner program required — Glassdoor API access requires partner program approval; not self-serve for commercial use
Limited API availability — Glassdoor API appears partially deprecated or restricted; verify current API availability before building
Salary data is self-reported — treat as directional benchmark; individual accuracy varies significantly by contributor
No webhooks — polling for new reviews is required; implement with low frequency (daily) as review volume is modest per company
Employer vs job seeker endpoints — API endpoints differ for employer use cases vs developer use cases; verify applicable endpoint
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employer review data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Employee review and salary data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employer review data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Anonymous employee review and salary data.
